_meta.description: Open WebUI model configuration for NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 550B via NIM
_meta.import_path: Open WebUI → Admin Panel → Models → Import

name: Nemotron Ultra 550B — AI-OS

meta.description: NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 550B via Cloud NIM, configured for AI Operating System runtime. Production-tuned with modular prompt architecture, memory orchestration, and Free Tier RPM optimization.

_warnings: Do NOT set top_k — not supported by NIM (ref: AI-0003 §4.2)
Do NOT set thinking as top-level param — use extra_body only (ref: AI-0003 §4.3)
Do NOT add stop: ['</s>'] — LLaMA token, wrong model family (ref: AI-0003 §4.4)
temperature must be 1.0 per NVIDIA recommendation (ref: AI-0001 §3.2)
